sources.title: The Other Side Of Hope 2017
sources.description: The Other Side Of Hope 2017 THE OTHER SIDE OF HOPE | Toivon tuolla puolen (2017) Aki Kaurismaki

metadata.Plot: Syrian refugee Khaled stows away on a freighter to Helsinki. Meanwhile, traveling salesman Wikström wins big at a poker table and buys himself a restaurant with the proceeds. When the authorities turn down his application for asylum, Khaled is forced underground and Wikström finds him sleeping in the yard behind his restaurant. He offers him a job and a roof over his head and, for a while, they form a Utopian union with the restaurant's waitress, the chef, and his dog.
metadata.Actors: Sherwan Haji, Sakari Kuosmanen, Kaija Pakarinen
